revision.comment: categorization (via [[WP:JWB]])
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = World's largest islands |title = [[List of islands by area|World's largest islands]] |image = {{portal|Islands}} |bodyclass = hlist
|group1 = {{convert|100000|km2|0|abbr=on|disp=br()}} and greater |list1 = * [[Geography of Greenland|Greenland]] * [[New Guinea]] * [[Borneo]] * [[Geography of Madagascar|Madagascar]] * [[Baffin Island]] * [[Sumatra]] * [[Honshu]] * [[Victoria Island]] (Canada) * [[Great Britain]] * [[Ellesmere Island]] * [[Sulawesi]] * [[South Island]] * [[Java]] * [[North Island]] * [[Luzon]] * [[Newfoundland (island)|Newfoundland]] * [[Geography of Cuba|Cuba]] * [[Geography of Iceland|Iceland]]
|group2 = {{convert|20000|-|99999|km2|abbr=on|disp=br()}} |list2 = * [[Mindanao]] * [[Ireland]] * [[Hokkaido]] * [[Hispaniola]] * [[Sakhalin]] * [[Banks Island]] * [[Geography of Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Geography of Tasmania|Tasmania]] * [[Devon Island]] * [[Alexander Island]] * [[Severny Island]] * [[Isla Grande de Tierra del Fuego]] <!-- * [[Berkner Island]] not an island! but an ice rise! --> * [[Axel Heiberg Island]] * [[Melville Island (Northwest Territories and Nunavut)|Melville Island]] * [[Southampton Island]] * [[Marajó]] * [[Spitsbergen]] * [[Kyushu]] * [[Geography of Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[New Britain]] * [[Prince of Wales Island (Nunavut)|Prince of Wales Island]] * [[Yuzhny Island]] * [[Hainan#Geography|Hainan]] * [[Vancouver Island]] * [[Timor]] * [[Sicily#Geography|Sicily]] * [[Somerset Island (Nunavut)|Somerset Island]] * [[Kotelny Island]] * [[Sardinia#Geography|Sardinia]] * [[Bananal Island|Bananal]]
<!-- | below = ;Main list : [[List of islands by area]] --> }}<noinclude>{{doc|content= {{A note}} Navbox is limited to islands of {{convert|20000|km2|0}} or more. {{mainlist|List of islands by area}} }} [[Category:Island navigational boxes]] [[Category:World topic navigational boxes]] </noinclude>
